base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional man in their fifties, of mixed heritage, with salt-and-pepper hair and deep dark eyes, a relaxed expression. even studio lighting with a soft box. a softly blurred neutral indoor background. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A full-body shot of a person in their early 40s, presenting as male, with warm olive skin and subtle fine lines around the eyes, shopping at an outdoor farmer's market. He holds a paper bag filled with vegetables. He has a squarer face with a subtly softer jawline, short, wavy salt-and-pepper hair, mostly dark brown with significant graying, styled back from a receding hairline. His eyes are dark brown, slightly hooded, and narrowly set, beneath thick, dark, straight eyebrows. His nose is slightly upturned with a delicate bridge, and his mouth has thinner lips curved into a warm, closed-mouth smile. A neatly trimmed, salt-and-pepper beard and mustache cover the lower face. He has prominent cheekbones and a longer face than average. He is looking directly at the viewer with a friendly expression, head held straight. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
